---
id: get-config-toml
title: "GetConfigToml"
description: "Retrieves the full config in TOML format, including default configs with schemas, dimensions, and overrides. This endpoint is optimized for clients that prefer TOML format for configuration management."
sidebar_label: "GetConfigToml"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/superposition
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"GetConfigToml"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/config/toml"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves the full config in TOML format, including default configs with schemas, dimensions, and overrides. This endpoint is optimized for clients that prefer TOML format for configuration management.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"x-org-id","in":"header","schema":{"type":"string"},"required":true},{"name":"x-workspace","in":"header","schema":{"type":"string"},"required":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}

>
  
</StatusCodes>
